temporal_description:
(00:00-00:07) A wide shot reveals a desolate, snow-covered alley at night. The scene is bathed in a cold, blue light from a single streetlamp, casting long shadows. Snow falls steadily, blanketing the ground and the tops of the dark, imposing buildings on either side. A faint, ominous sound begins to build in the background. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and foreboding atmosphere, setting a tense mood for the events that are about to unfold.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, rumbling, and ominous sound effect begins, creating a sense of impending danger.)
(00:08-00:12) A small, dark, furry creature, resembling a weasel or a small fox, is seen scurrying down the steep, snowy hill. It moves quickly and low to the ground, disappearing from view as it navigates the dark, snowy terrain. (Storyline: The appearance of the small creature introduces a element of wildlife into the otherwise empty and menacing environment, hinting at the ecosystem of this harsh location.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous, low-frequency rumbling sound continues, growing slightly in intensity.)
